timeout_scenario.trigger: ML service does not respond within the configured timeout.

predictions.explanation: Fallback response is used because ML service timeout occurred.

explanation_details.explanation_text: fallback-maintenance-v1.0.0 (parts_health_fallback) predicts medium risk for Engine oil. The score is 65/100 with about 1500 km remaining.

factors.name: risk_score
factors.description: Normalized maintenance risk score produced by the selected baseline model.

factors.name: remaining_km
factors.description: Estimated distance before the next recommended maintenance action.

service_unavailable_scenario.trigger: ML service returns 503 or is unreachable.

predictions.explanation: Fallback response is used because ML service is unavailable.

explanation_details.explanation_text: fallback-maintenance-v1.0.0 (parts_health_fallback) predicts medium risk for Engine oil. The score is 65/100 with about 1500 km remaining.

factors.name: risk_score
factors.description: Normalized maintenance risk score produced by the selected baseline model.

factors.name: remaining_km
factors.description: Estimated distance before the next recommended maintenance action.

invalid_ml_response_scenario.trigger: ML service returns response that does not match prediction contract.
invalid_ml_response_scenario.backend_action: Reject invalid ML response and switch to fallback prediction flow.

predictions.explanation: Fallback response is used because ML response validation failed.
